description: Behavioral story map for MM3 fixture — Phase 3 (PROCESS-PLAN). Epics align with bounded contexts in maps-models-specs/map-model-spec.md. Stories are interactions, not a type taxonomy.

stories.name: Roll a check against a DC
stories.behavior: Form check total from d20 roll and modifiers; compare to difficulty class.

anchor.read: Interpret DC, circumstance modifiers, and check type from rules text.
anchor.write: Record success or failure and degree for the resolving action.

stories.name: Resolve an opposed check
stories.primary_actor: Two characters (or active vs passive opposition)
stories.behavior: Compare two check results per the opposed-by table or equivalent.

anchor.read: Look up which traits oppose for the contest.
anchor.write: Determine winner and apply outcome to the fiction.

stories.name: Interpret degrees of success or failure
stories.behavior: After a check, map margin to degree steps for narrative or mechanical follow-up.

anchor.read: Use degree tables; no mandatory persistent state change in this story alone.

stories.name: Apply skill ranks and defaults to a skill check
stories.behavior: Combine skill rank, ability default, and situational modifiers into the active bonus.

anchor.read: Read skill description, ability linkage, and trained-only rules.
anchor.write: Contribute the bonus into the current check total.

stories.name: Use a defense value as a passive target
stories.behavior: Use Parry, Dodge, Fortitude, or other defense as a number to beat.

anchor.read: Read the defense from the character; compare against an attack or effect.

stories.name: Build or adjust a power from ranked effects
stories.behavior: Select effects, ranks, extras, and flaws within power level limits.

anchor.write: Persist a power build on the character; validate against PL and effect rules.

stories.name: Resolve an attack-style effect against a defense
stories.behavior: Roll attack where required; apply damage or affliction resistance paths.

anchor.read: Read attack bonus, defense, resistance rules.
anchor.write: Apply HP loss, conditions, or resisted outcomes.

stories.name: Attach extras and flaws to an effect or power
stories.behavior: Trade cost and scope using the modifier families attached to powers/effects.

anchor.read: Read modifier descriptions and stacking limits.
anchor.write: Record chosen extras/flaws on the power or effect instance.

stories.name: Spend hero points or extra effort to change a roll outcome
stories.behavior: After seeing a roll, apply reroll or +2 rules per resource spend.

anchor.write: Consume the resource and adjust the die result or check total per rules.
